signals.catalyst_text: UK political realignment; Reform UK surge, Labour collapse, multi-party fragmentation
signals.notes: Elevated political uncertainty around next UK general election and fiscal policy direction pressures GBP.

signals.catalyst_text: UK local elections; end-of-two-party-politics framing
signals.notes: Policy uncertainty across councils and potential regulatory/fiscal shifts if Reform gains Westminster power.

signals.catalyst_text: BJP wins West Bengal; TVK disrupts Tamil Nadu; state-level policy shifts
signals.notes: New state governments may alter infrastructure, industrial policy, and regulatory environments favorably.

signals.catalyst_text: Indian state elections; BJP expansion into Bengal
signals.notes: Potential shifts in state capex, land policy, and business climate in two major states.

signals.catalyst_text: Michael Jackson biopic record opening; sequel talk
signals.notes: Box-office outperformance from largest music-biopic debut ever; catalog monetization and sequel optionality.

signals.catalyst_text: MJ catalog streaming surge (+95%); Thriller re-enters Billboard 200
signals.notes: Music-rights portfolio revaluation driven by biopic-induced catalog lift.

signals.catalyst_text: Devil Wears Prada 2 strong opening ($77M domestic/$157M worldwide); Streep pay-parity story
signals.notes: Box-office contribution from 20th Century Studios; franchise extension.

signals.catalyst_text: Canvas LMS breach by ShinyHunters; May 12 ransom deadline
signals.notes: Reputational/operational risk, potential customer churn, and cybersecurity remediation costs; Instructure has been taken private/delisted.

signals.catalyst_text: ShinyHunters extortion campaign; elevated cybersecurity attention
signals.notes: Demand tailwind for endpoint/cloud security; sector attention from Canvas breach.

signals.catalyst_text: Cybersecurity breach cycle; Hacker term ascending
signals.notes: Sector attention and enterprise security spending narrative.

signals.catalyst_text: MV Hondius hantavirus outbreak; cruise-ship disease narrative
signals.notes: Cruise industry sentiment risk from disease-on-ship framing; sector contagion despite not being directly affected.

signals.catalyst_text: Hantavirus cruise outbreak; COVID comparison framing
signals.notes: Sector sentiment risk; WHO 'not another COVID' messaging cuts both ways.

signals.catalyst_text: Man on Fire, Lord of the Flies, Apex launches; content pipeline
signals.notes: Content velocity and subscriber engagement from new originals.

signals.catalyst_text: Cape Fear series trailer (Apple TV+, June 5); Ted Lasso S4 announced
signals.notes: Content investment visibility and streaming subscriber narrative.

signals.catalyst_text: The Boys final season; Vought Rising; Bezos Met Gala/Project Prometheus
signals.notes: Prime Video franchise value and Bezos personal brand/capital deployment narrative.

signals.catalyst_text: Star Fox announced for Switch 2; June 25 launch
signals.notes: Switch 2 launch ecosystem; franchise revival as platform driver.

signals.catalyst_text: Wuthering Heights streaming on HBO Max; Mortal Kombat II theatrical
signals.notes: Content monetization across theatrical and streaming windows.

signals.catalyst_text: Nolan's Odyssey July 17 release; IMAX-first positioning
signals.notes: Tentpole event-film revenue and IMAX premium pricing for Universal/NBCUniversal.

signals.catalyst_text: The Odyssey shot entirely on IMAX; summer 2026 tentpole
signals.notes: Premium format demand; Nolan partnership as brand driver.

signals.catalyst_text: Boeing 777X scoring +1.34 in Term Report
signals.notes: Certification/delivery attention and aerospace sentiment.

signals.catalyst_text: Dynatrace +6.50 in Term Report (software/cloud)
signals.notes: Elevated search interest; potential earnings or product catalyst.

signals.catalyst_text: Berkshire Hathaway -1.17 in Term Report
signals.notes: Post-annual-meeting attention fade and Buffett succession narrative cooling.
